name: PDF SOLUTIONS INC
summary: PDF Solutions, Inc. provides comprehensive data solutions for the semiconductor and electronics ecosystems, offering software, SaaS, engineering services, and hardware systems. Key products include the PDF Solutions Platform, DirectScan (e-beam inspection), eProbe inline inspection, Cimetrix connectivity/control software, and secureWISE secure data exchange network. Revenue comes from Platform fees (licenses, SaaS, engineering) and Volume-based fees (Cimetrix runtime licenses, secureWISE data, Gainshare royalties). Customers include IDMs, fabless companies, foundries, OSATs, equipment manufacturers, EMS, ODMs, and system houses.
